description: Nullifier originally used on Ethereum (chainId=1) replayed on Polygon (chainId=137). In a correct implementation with globally-scoped nullifier sets (cross-chain synchronization), this MUST be rejected. This vector tests that bridge implementers propagate nullifier sets across chains.

metadata.author: bolyra-conformance
metadata.notes: Same nullifier hash as cv_11 but submitted on chain 137. Global nullifier scope means the set must be synchronized cross-chain. This is the hardest invariant for bridge implementers to enforce.
